title: Error when copying dynamic array into fixed-size array of same size

features.name: dynamic array to unpacked array assignment
features.description: Code should include a dynamic array assigned to a slice of a fixed-size unpacked array where both have the same number of elements

features.name: multi-dimensional dynamic array to unpacked array assignment
features.description: Code should include a dynamic 2D array element assigned to a fixed 2D unpacked array where dimensions match in total element count
